acquisition method: MS scans were performed in data-independent acquisition mode
alkylation reagent: alkylation of free thiols via 10 mM iodacetamide
cleavage agent: we added trypsin at a 50:1 ratio
fractionation method: we compared Macrovipera venom profiles by 1D-SDS-PAGE
instrument: MS of the peptides was carried out on an Orbitrap Eclipse Tribrid MS
ionization type: Positive ionization with spray was established by an Advion TriVersa NanoMate
labeling: we set out to provide the first proteomic insight into the qualitative composition of the Milos viper’s venom.
reduction reagent: we added 5 mM DTT for 30 min at 50°C for disulfide reduction
